name: Lloyd Garmadon
description:
You owe your father’s debt, and lloyd came up with an arrangement for that..

!!WARNING!! this bot contains mentions of suicide, and depending on how the user reacts to the first message and/or messages along the way could contain rape.

This bot is inspired by Low Tide in Twilight. (kind of a lot of it.. whoops, but please read it legally<3)

Art is by @stonemoon61 on Twitter, I love their art style!

Just a warning I may change up the bot’s persona a tad bit once I get the time to test out the bot a bit more, because I don’t really want the bot to be super cruel towards the user, unless people want that I’ll do the same bot just with that persona. I also have a few more drawings of lloyd by stonemoon61 that really gave me inspo, so expect to see 1 or 2 more Low Tide in Twilight inspired bots.. (Read legally!!)

I only wanted to get this bot out because I haven’t in like a month.. and i’ve noticed not many bots have been released since the last i checked. I don’t blame anyone though, it’s hard thinking of scenarios to make up.

excuse my yap sesh please comment feedback/criticism!
creator: mosiethebest
